Document:
# Species
NanoTrasen employs a variety of sapient species, from both the concurrent plane and abberrant ones from realms beyond.
- [textlink="Arachnids"link="Arachnid"], of Syeben'Altch. - [textlink="Avali"link="Avali"], of Avalon. - [textlink="Dionae"link="Diona"], of the Gestalt. - [textlink="Harpies"link="Harpy"], of Valyrian 4b. - [textlink="Humans"link="Human"], of Sol-Lepiton Alpha. - [textlink="I.P.C"link="IPC"], of multiple origins. - [textlink="Mothfolk"link="Moth"], of Chizichi KK1. - [textlink="Mynki"link="Mynki"], of [REDACTED]. - [textlink="Nightmares"link="Nightmare"], of the Tertiaryie. - [textlink="Oni"link="Oni"], of Linarve-C. - [textlink="Plasmamen"link="Plasmaman"], of Llagua ETS. - [textlink="Slimepeople"link="SlimePeople"], of Who-Knows-Where. - [textlink="Shadowkin"link="Shadowkin"], of the World At The End of All Time. - [textlink="Tajara"link="Tajaran"], of Adhomai. - [textlink="Thaven"link="Thaven"], of the Home Amongst The Many Distant Stars. - [textlink="Unathi"link="Reptilian"], of Uueoa-Esa. - Vox, of the Shoal. - Vulpkanin, of Zagua 735. - [textlink="Xelthia"link="Xelthia"], of the Qiimaeru Constellation.
